checks.name: builder.go exists
checks.evidence: No builder.go; Model built via struct literals model.go:55, rest.go:43, entity.go:33

checks.name: ToEntity() method
checks.evidence: entity.go:32 has Make() but no Model.ToEntity()

checks.name: TransformSlice
checks.evidence: Absent; no list endpoint, no inline loops in resource.go (N/A)

checks.name: Providers lazy
checks.evidence: provider.go:10-19 eager First() wrapped in FixedProvider/ErrorProvider, not database.Query

checks.name: No direct entity creation in handlers
Domain error to HTTP mapping
checks.evidence: POST resource.go:62-65 and PATCH :87-90 map all errors to 500; not-found not 404, no 400

checks.name: No atlas-constants duplication
checks.evidence: wallet-domain DTOs; currencyType 1/2/3 has no shared equivalent (magic-number note)

checks.name: Dockerfile 4-block per lib
checks.evidence: shared root Dockerfile; no new lib require (go.mod unchanged)

checks.name: Kafka topic naming
checks.evidence: env-configmap.yaml:77,152 KEY:"KEY"; atlas-cashshop.yaml:21-23 envFrom atlas-env, no literal override

checks.name: Producer stubbed in emitting tests
checks.evidence: no wallet test calls AndEmit/message.Emit (grep NONE)

checks.name: Client wire values config-resolved
checks.evidence: domain service emits semantic keys; no client wire literal

checks.name: builder/model/admin/provider placement
checks.evidence: Builder entirely absent (no builder.go/NewBuilder); same root as DOM-01

checks.name: No catch-all
checks.evidence: kafka.go holds only message-package responsibilities (event/command DTOs + topic env keys)

checks.name: Producer stubbed in emitting tests
checks.evidence: producer_test.go:18 materializes provider only, no message.Emit

checks.name: Administrator handles writes
checks.evidence: writes via domain processor->administrator; no db.Create/Save in consumer.go

checks.name: Emit path tested
checks.evidence: transitively emits (message.Emit) but no test file in package; task-102 failure-fast emit untested

security.notes: Not an auth/token service; SEC-01..03 N/A; SEC-04 pass (no hardcoded secrets)

external.notes: No requests.RootUrl/GetRequest/PostRequest in scope; EXT N/A
